name: button-icons-evident
description: S-ICON-EVIDENT (operator UAT 2026-07-17: 'increase the size of icons in buttons everywhere to make it more evident'). The glyphs inside the bottom-tab buttons and the per-row + add button must render visibly larger than the pre-bump sizes. Red-first: thresholds below PASS on the bumped sizes (tab icon 1.28rem, li-add 1.35rem) and FAIL on the pre-fix sizes (tab 1.05rem/~16.8px, li-add 1.1rem/~17.6px).

steps.label: bottom-tab icon glyphs are enlarged (>= 19px; pre-fix 1.05rem ~16.8px FAILS)
per-row + add button glyph is enlarged (>= 20px; pre-fix 1.1rem ~17.6px FAILS)
the appbar settings-gear button glyph is enlarged (>= 18px; pre-fix 1.05rem ~16.8px FAILS)
